ddls:
CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the article */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who wrote the article */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the article was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the article was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Publication status of the article */,
  "featured" INTEGER /* Whether the article is featured */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the article's featured image */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the article belongs to */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag the article belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article the comment belongs to */,
  "commenter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "body" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was last updated */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of comment (e.g., regular, reply) */,
  "is_moderated" INTEGER /* Whether the comment has been moderated */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Whether the comment has been approved */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment analysis result (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_commenter_id FOREIGN KEY ("commenter_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., author, moderator, admin) */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "following" TEXT /* IDs of users the user is following */,
  "followers" TEXT /* IDs of users following the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comment_replies" (
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment reply */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment the reply belongs to */,
  "replier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the reply */,
  "body" TEXT /* Content of the reply */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the reply was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the reply was last updated */,
  "reply_to" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being replied to */,
  "is_moderated" INTEGER /* Whether the reply has been moderated */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Whether the reply has been approved */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment analysis result (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_replies_replier_id FOREIGN KEY ("replier_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_replies_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comment_votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment vote */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment the vote belongs to */,
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the vote */,
  "vote_type" TEXT /* Type of vote (e.g., upvote, downvote) */,
  "vote_weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the vote (e.g., 1, -1) */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Whether the vote is valid (e.g., not spam) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_votes_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_votes_voter_id FOREIGN KEY ("voter_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article tag */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_tags_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article category */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article the category belongs to */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_categories_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_articles" (
  "user_article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user article */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the article */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "is_author" INTEGER /* Whether the user is the author of the article */,
  "is_editor" INTEGER /* Whether the user is the editor of the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_articles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_articles_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_comments" (
  "user_comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment */,
  "is_commenter" INTEGER /* Whether the user made the comment */,
  "is_moderator" INTEGER /* Whether the user is a moderator of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_comments_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comment_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment report */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being reported */,
  "reporter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the report */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the report */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Whether the report is valid (e.g., not spam) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_reports_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_reports_reporter_id FOREIGN KEY ("reporter_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., new comment, new article) */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article related to the notification */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment related to the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Whether the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., view, click) */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article related to the event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who triggered the event */,
  "event_data" TEXT /* Additional data about the event (e.g., click coordinates) */,
  "event_source" TEXT /* Source of the event (e.g., article, comment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who was assigned the role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the assignment is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
